description: Horizon benchmark theme schema — full editor tree for theme-packs/horizon. Use as reference when generating new theme packs.

header.description: Store header — logo, navigation, search, localization, and appearance. Select Header in the sidebar for layout settings; open Logo or Menu blocks for content.

footer.description: Site footer — layout, spacing, and color scheme. Open Email signup or other blocks for content.

settingsFields.description: Update your store name in general settings.

settingsFields.description: Show Follow on Shop button when the store supports it.

custom_section.description: An empty section you can customize with blocks and settings.

divider.label: Divider
divider.description: A horizontal line to separate content.

editorial.label: Editorial
editorial.description: Split image and story content with a text link.

editorial_jumbo.label: Editorial: Jumbo text
editorial_jumbo.description: Large display headline beside featured media.

image_with_text.description: Split image and text with a call-to-action button.

storytelling_video.description: Video with diagonal media and caption footer.

email_signup.description: Collect emails with a signup form.
